2.0.0: After stepping into the Star Gate,

2.0.2: emitted an intense wave of heat.
2.0.4: I hurriedly took out the fragment, only to discover
2.0.5: that what had been calm and stable all this
2.0.6: time had begun to undergo a transformation—
2.2.0: I have no idea what just happened.
2.2.2: like crazy under those weird pulses...
2.5.0: As the stone unexpectedly and rapidly turned
2.5.1: into liquid, I frantically rummaged through my
2.5.2: backpack and pulled out a glass bottle, hastily
2.5.3: collecting the red liquid still clinging to my hands.
2.7.0: Could this be the Elixir Rubrum that my
2.7.2: But why would it react inside this gate...?
